SITE_ARRIVED.description: Visual inspection on all cabinet sides and doors before unloading.

SITE_ARRIVED.item_text: Verify serial number matches delivery note
SITE_ARRIVED.description: Match factory serial/QR with delivery and dispatch documents.

SITE_ARRIVED.item_text: Confirm correct unit delivered to correct site
SITE_ARRIVED.description: Cross-check project/site code and customer order details.

CIVIL_INSTALLATION.description: Verify pad dimensions and compressive quality before placement.
Check level in both axes using spirit level.

CIVIL_INSTALLATION.item_text: BESS cabinet placed per layout drawing
CIVIL_INSTALLATION.description: Position cabinet based on approved installation layout.

CIVIL_INSTALLATION.item_text: Cabinet secured with M24 anchor bolts to specified torque
CIVIL_INSTALLATION.description: Confirm anchor quantity and torque values as per installation manual.

CIVIL_INSTALLATION.item_text: Minimum 1000mm clearance on all 4 sides confirmed
CIVIL_INSTALLATION.description: Keep service and airflow clearance on all sides.
Ensure anti-vibration support is installed as required.
Capture cabinet placement proof photo after alignment and anchoring.

DC_INSTALLATION.item_text: All DC breakers confirmed OFF before wiring
DC_INSTALLATION.description: Verify zero-energy condition before touching DC wiring.

DC_INSTALLATION.item_text: Battery cluster cables connected per wiring diagram
DC_INSTALLATION.description: Follow polarity and routing exactly as the wiring diagram.

DC_INSTALLATION.item_text: Busbar bolts torqued to spec - blue pen mark by installer
DC_INSTALLATION.description: Installer torque-check and mark each busbar bolt.

DC_INSTALLATION.item_text: Inspector re-torque verified - red pen mark applied
DC_INSTALLATION.description: Independent QC re-check torque and mark verification.
Final hand-check and visual check before energization.
Use ESD-safe handling while working on sensitive boards.
Avoid direct contact with BMU circuitry and connectors.

AC_INSTALLATION.description: Lock-out/check breaker state before AC wiring.

AC_INSTALLATION.item_text: AC grid cables connected to combiner cabinet
AC_INSTALLATION.description: Verify terminal mapping and cable size.

AC_INSTALLATION.item_text: Phase sequence verified A-B-C: 400V between phases
AC_INSTALLATION.description: Confirm sequence and line voltage with calibrated meter.
Check phase-neutral voltage in permissible tolerance.

AC_INSTALLATION.item_text: PE grounding wire connected and secure
AC_INSTALLATION.description: Confirm earth continuity and terminal tightness.

AC_INSTALLATION.item_text: All cable entries sealed with sealing compound
AC_INSTALLATION.description: Seal entries for ingress protection and safety compliance.

AC_INSTALLATION.item_text: No cables routed through air inlet or outlet

AC_INSTALLATION.description: Maintain routing separation and reduce interference.

PRE_COMMISSION.description: Pre-energization cross-check for all power and control wiring.
Verify communication cable termination and link health.

PRE_COMMISSION.item_text: No loose connections throughout the entire unit
AC surge protector indicator is GREEN

PRE_COMMISSION.description: Check UPS operation and output presence.

PRE_COMMISSION.item_text: CO2 fire extinguisher present on site
PRE_COMMISSION.description: Verify fire safety readiness near equipment.

PRE_COMMISSION.item_text: "Do Not Close" warning signs on all switches

COLD_COMMISSION.description: Enable auxiliary supply for startup checks.

COLD_COMMISSION.item_text: AC output button pressed - indicator GREEN
BMS contactor status: CLOSED after 30 seconds

COLD_COMMISSION.description: Verify no active alarms before hot commissioning.

HOT_COMMISSION.description: Record evidence that SOC increases during charge cycle.
Validate stable output under discharge/load conditions.

HOT_COMMISSION.item_text: Grid synchronization: voltage and frequency within tolerance
HOT_COMMISSION.description: Confirm sync values within configured range.
Check alarms and events for healthy operation.

HOT_COMMISSION.item_text: Performance test completed and result logged
HOT_COMMISSION.description: Enter measured KPIs and final test outcome.

FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.description: QA approval recorded for final handover.

FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.item_text: Warranty start date recorded in system
FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.description: Set warranty baseline date in backend records.
Ensure all stage documents are attached.

FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.item_text: Full photo set of installation captured
